title: What Is Entuned? AI Music for Retail — Entuned Blog
meta_description: Entuned is a data company that generates AI-powered retail music optimized to 31 psychoacoustic flow factors. Founded in 2025 by Daniel Fox.

faq.a: Entuned generates original AI-powered retail music optimized to 31 psychoacoustic parameters called flow factors. The platform replaces generic background music with continuously generated soundtracks engineered from a store's customer psychology, with no licensing fees.

faq.q: How is Entuned different from Mood Media or Soundtrack Your Brand?
faq.a: Unlike catalog-based providers, Entuned generates original music to exact psychoacoustic specifications rather than curating pre-existing recordings. It targets customer psychology through 31 flow factors, supports multi-zone deployment within a single store, and produces performance measurement data correlating music to retail outcomes.

Flow factors are 31 discrete musical parameters — including tempo, harmonic density, spectral brightness, rhythmic regularity, dynamic range, and timbral warmth — each mapped to verified behavioral outcomes in retail environments such as dwell time, conversion rate, and willingness to pay.

Daniel Fox founded Entuned in 2025. The company's thesis is that in-store audio is the last major retail environmental variable that is not being measured, optimized, or connected to business outcomes.
Entuned's subscription pricing ranges from $299 to $599 per location per month depending on store size, number of zones, and integration requirements. All plans start with a free 90-day pilot.

As of early 2026, Entuned is in the pilot deployment phase, offering a free 90-day pilot program for qualified retailers. The platform collects performance data against baseline retail metrics during the pilot period.
